activities.name: Copy data from adls to new table
Copy data from ADLS to ASQL
Copy data nested josn to sql

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    p.ProductId,
    p.ProductName,
    p.UnitPrice,
    s.InvoiceNum,
    s.Qty,
    s.Sales
FROM Product p
LEFT JOIN SalesTran s
ON p.ProductId = s.ProductId;

sqlReaderQuery.value: @replace('SELECT OrderDate,ProductKey, EnglishProductName, SalesAmount FROM dbo.Orders WHERE Country = ''Countryname''','Countryname',variables('Country'))

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY,REGION FROM dbo.InvoiceData
ORDER BY COUNTRY,REGION
